titleStmt.title: SII 16.70: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 70. (A.R. No. 353 of 1905.) DOMMARA-NANDYĀLA, JAMMALAMADUGU TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab built into the east wall of the central shrine of the Chennakēśavasvāmin temple.
This is dated Śaka 1443, Vṛisha, Jyēshṭha ba. 3, Thursday, corresponding to 1521 A.D., May 23, f.d.t. °61.

It records the gift of sthaḷasuṅkam of Nandēla in Rēnāḍu, in Ghaṇḍikōṭa-sīma, to god Chennakēśvara by Katti Yaṟama-nāyuḍu, son of Pāpā-nāyuḍu and grand-son of Tippi-nāyuḍu on the occasion of the consecration of the deity, for maintaining a perpetual lamp. The gift village is stated to be situated in Ghaṇḍikōṭa-sīma obtained as nāyaṅkara by the chief from the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī jayādbudaya śālivāhana śakhavaruṣaṁbulu 1443 Āgu
nēṁṭi vriṣasaṁvya(ṁ)tsara jēṣṭa ba 3 bṛ śrīmadrājādhirāja paramē
śvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīkṛṣṇadēvamahārāyalu pṛthvīrājyaṁ cēyu
cuṁḍagā śrīmatu ka tti tippināyaḍu pāpānāyaḍu yaṟamanāyani
gāru rēnāṭi naṁdēla cenna kēśvaradēvaraku Iccina dharmmaśāsana vatra kramameṭlaṁnanu mānāyaṁThis is obviously apatra
karānaku ce(ṁ)lle gaṁḍḍikōṭasīmalōni rēnāṭi naṁdēlanu māku naḍacē staḷasuṁkaṁ ceṁ
nna kēśvaradēvuniki pratiṣṭhākālamaṁdu Akhaṁḍḍadīpārādhanaku cellivaccē Aṭugā
nu sahira(ṁ)ṇyōdakadānadhārāpūrvakaṁgānu samarppiṁ stimi .
Digital edition of SII 16.70 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
